nodes.label: Civilization design, hierarchy, governance, and law
Civilization design, hierarchy, governance, and law
Athena identity, pedagogy, and narrative voice
Athena identity, pedagogy, and narrative voice
Mythic sign systems, encoded memory, and symbol runtime
Mythic sign systems, encoded memory, and symbol runtime
SEED
nodes.purpose: initialize a new branch, intake, or civilizational sub-cell

nodes.label: ENCODE
nodes.purpose: bind a symbol system, glyph set, or memory carrier into the graph

nodes.label: ROUTE
nodes.purpose: select lawful destination, corridor, and metro ride

nodes.label: BIND
nodes.purpose: attach a message or task to a stable witness-bearing object

nodes.label: WITNESS
nodes.purpose: promote a claim only when evidence and replay are present

nodes.label: QUARANTINE
nodes.purpose: contain unresolved conflict, paradox, or corruption

nodes.label: MERGE
nodes.purpose: compose multiple agents or documents into one stabilized output

nodes.label: RESTART
nodes.purpose: collapse a stale branch while preserving lawful continuity

nodes.label: DEPLOY
nodes.purpose: hand a closed artifact into bounded execution

nodes.label: MEMORY
nodes.purpose: persist state across passes, mirrors, and migrations

nodes.label: TEACH
nodes.purpose: convert the current state into transmissible pedagogy

nodes.label: GOVERN
nodes.purpose: apply explicit hierarchy, rule, and escalation law

nodes.label: MEASURE
nodes.purpose: record metrics, drift, and performance envelopes

nodes.label: HEAL
nodes.purpose: repair decay, incoherence, or motivational collapse

nodes.label: PUBLISH
nodes.purpose: emit signed release packets into wider circulation

nodes.label: SUCCESSION
nodes.purpose: transfer continuity to the next agent, generation, or tome

nodes.label: Sign
nodes.purpose: atomic governance symbols that encode admissible operations

nodes.label: Message
nodes.purpose: truth-typed packets routed across the swarm

nodes.label: Task
nodes.purpose: bounded work units with witnesses, replay, and exit conditions

nodes.label: Cell
nodes.purpose: small agent teams that hold a local region of the graph

nodes.label: Chapter
nodes.purpose: chapter weavers that stabilize one 4^4 tile

nodes.label: Family
nodes.purpose: thematic councils that govern recurring motifs across sources

nodes.label: Rail Council
nodes.purpose: lane-specific coordinators that balance Su, Me, and Sa traffic

nodes.label: Civilization
nodes.purpose: the whole manuscript polity as a self-regenerating nervous system
